creator: kuriyama@opt.phys.waseda.ac.jp
text:
OK, it's time to update p5-Mail-Folder, now!

  Ports for mail/p5-Mail-Tools, devel/p5-File-Sync and
devel/p5-TimeDate are committed and updated.

  Patches below are :
    o portlint compliant
    o add necessary dependencies

  Thanks.
